# devin_knowledge_note (Resource)

Manages a Devin knowledge note within an organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "devin_knowledge_note" "api_conventions" {
  org_id  = devin_organization.backend.org_id
  name    = "API Conventions"
  body    = file("${path.module}/knowledge/api-conventions.md")
  trigger = "When working on API endpoints"
}

# Notes can be pinned to a specific repository.
resource "devin_knowledge_note" "deploy_process" {
  org_id      = devin_organization.backend.org_id
  name        = "Deploy Process"
  body        = file("${path.module}/knowledge/deploy-process.md")
  trigger     = "When deploying the service"
  pinned_repo = "mycompany/backend-service"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `body` (String) Body content of the knowledge note (markdown).
- `name` (String) Name/title of the knowledge note.
- `org_id` (String) Organization ID that owns this knowledge note.
- `trigger` (String) When this knowledge note is retrieved. Describes the trigger/scope condition.

### Optional

- `folder_id` (String) ID of the knowledge folder containing this note. Omit for the root folder.
- `is_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the note is enabled. Defaults to true; a disabled parent folder can override this.
- `pinned_repo` (String) Repository this note is pinned to (e.g., 'myorg/myrepo').

### Read-Only

- `note_id` (String) Knowledge note ID (assigned by Devin).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Knowledge notes are imported with the owning org ID and the note ID.
terraform import devin_knowledge_note.api_conventions org-abc123/note-def456
```
